parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM mes.machine_data
WHERE LOWER(data ->> 'bind_id') = LOWER('{{ $json.JSON.uuid }}')
AND data ->> 'sn' = '{{ $json.JSON.retroid }}'
AND procedure_detail_id = '{{ $json.JSON.procedure_detail_id }}'
AND retroid_id = '{{ $json.JSON.retroid_id }}'
ORDER BY createtime DESC
LIMIT 1;

nodes.name: 查询匹配关系是否已存在
判断匹配关系是否存在

parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM mes.machine_data
WHERE LOWER(data ->>'bind_id')!=LOWER('{{ $json.JSON.uuid }}') and data ->>'sn' = '{{ $json.JSON.retroid }}'AND procedure_detail_id ='{{ $json.JSON.procedure_detail_id }}'
AND retroid_id = '{{ $json.JSON.retroid_id }}'
order by createtime DESC
limit 1

SELECT * FROM mes.machine_data
WHERE LOWER(data ->>'uuid_unique')=LOWER('{{ $json.data[0].JSON.uuid_unique }}') and data ->>'sn' != '{{ $json.data[0].JSON.retroid }}'AND procedure_detail_id ='{{ $json.data[0].JSON.procedure_detail_id }}'

order by createtime DESC
limit 1

select * from mes.retroid r
where r.retroid = '{{ $('Code3').item.json.body.sn }}'
and r.status in ('1','2')

select pd.procedure_detail_id from mes.procedure_detail pd  
where pd.procedure_name ='SN与UUID绑定';

select * 
from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id in (
    select pd.procedure_detail_id 
    from mes.procedure_detail pd 
where pd.procedure_name in('SN与UUID绑定','物料解除绑定'))
and (LOWER(data ->>'bind_id')=LOWER('{{ $('切割字符').item.json.uuid }}')
or LOWER(data ->> 'unbind_id')=LOWER('{{ $('切割字符').item.json.uuid }}'))
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $('判断uuid是否绑定其他sn').item.json.retroid_id }}'
order by md.createtime desc 
limit 1;

select pd.procedure_detail_id from mes.procedure_detail pd  
where pd.procedure_name ='SN与UUID绑定';

SELECT procedure_detail_id,machine_data_id,retroid_id FROM mes.machine_data
where (LOWER(data ->>'bind_id')=LOWER('{{ $json.data.bind_id }}') or (LOWER(data ->>'unbind_id')=LOWER('{{ $json.data.bind_id }}'))) and procedure_detail_id in (select pd.procedure_detail_id from mes.procedure_detail pd 
where pd.procedure_name in('物料解除绑定','SN与UUID绑定') )
and retroid_id='{{ $('Code1').item.json.JSON.retroid_id }}'
order by createtime DESC
limit 1

nodes.name: 查该sn下最新的一条绑定uuid/解绑uuid数据
判断是否解绑，判断条件相等(false)为绑定

parameters.query:
select md.data ->>'uuid' as uuid,md.retroid_id from mes.machine_data md 
where md.retroid_id ='{{ $('查询匹配关系是否已存在').item.json.retroid_id }}' and md.procedure_detail_id ='{{ $('查uuid与sn绑定工序的工序id').item.json.procedure_detail_id }}'
order by md.createtime desc 
limit 1

select pd.procedure_detail_id from mes.procedure_detail pd  
where pd.procedure_name ='SN与UUID绑定';

select retroid_generate_id 
from mes.retroid  
WHERE retroid = '{{$json.data.sn.trim() }}'
and status in('1','2')
